title: Senior Teacher - Quest Alliance Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Quest Alliance Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quest Alliance Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Quest Alliance Capital India:
Quest Alliance Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
